text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 42 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Blindness Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF BAKER, UNION, AND WALLOWA COUNTIES BAKER CITY VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists individuals with disabilities in finding and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. Services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and support for independent living. Services are provided in partnership with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 3165 10th Street Suite 500 Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (541) 523-8444 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF BAKER, UNION, AND WALLOWA COUNTIES ENTERPRISE VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists individuals with disabilities in finding and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities.
